Description: Add single item to cart
Steps: 1. Login as standard_user 2. Click on any product 3. Click Add to cart
Expected Result: Cart icon shows 1 item

Description: Add multiple items to cart
Steps: 1. Login as standard_user 2. Add 3 different products to cart
Expected Result: Cart icon shows correct item count

Description: Remove item from cart
Steps: 1. Login as standard_user 2. Add item to cart 3. Click Remove
Expected Result: Item is removed and cart count decreases

Description: Verify cart persists after navigation
Steps: 1. Add item to cart 2. Navigate to product page 3. Come back to cart
Expected Result: Cart still contains the added item

Description: Proceed to checkout with items in cart
Steps: 1. Add item to cart 2. Click cart icon 3. Click Checkout
Expected Result: User is taken to checkout information page

Description: Checkout with empty cart
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click cart icon without adding items 3. Click Checkout
Expected Result: User proceeds to checkout with empty order

Description: Fill checkout form with valid details
Steps: 1. On checkout page enter First Name: John 2. Last Name: Doe 3. Zip: 12345 4. Click Continue
Expected Result: User proceeds to checkout overview page

Description: Checkout with empty first name
Steps: 1. On checkout page leave First Name empty 2. Fill other fields 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error message: First Name is required

Description: Checkout with empty last name
Steps: 1. On checkout page leave Last Name empty 2. Fill other fields 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error message: Last Name is required

Description: Checkout with empty zip code
Steps: 1. On checkout page leave Zip empty 2. Fill other fields 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error message: Postal Code is required

Description: Verify order summary on overview page
Steps: 1. Add item to cart 2. Complete checkout form 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: Overview page shows item name price and total

Description: Verify total price calculation
Steps: 1. Add multiple items 2. Proceed to checkout overview
Expected Result: Total shown equals sum of all item prices plus tax

Description: Complete order successfully
Steps: 1. Add item 2. Fill checkout form 3. Click Continue 4. Click Finish
Expected Result: Order confirmation page shows: Thank you for your order

Description: Verify Cancel button on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Go to checkout info page 2. Click Cancel
Expected Result: User is taken back to cart page

Description: Verify Cancel button on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Go to checkout overview page 2. Click Cancel
Expected Result: User is taken back to products page

Description: Verify Back Home button after order completion
Steps: 1. Complete order 2. Click Back Home button
Expected Result: User is redirected to products page

Description: Add highest priced item and verify in cart
Steps: 1. Login 2. Sort products by Price high to low 3. Add first item to cart 4. Go to cart
Expected Result: Correct item and price shown in cart

Description: Verify item details in cart match product page
Steps: 1. Click on a product 2. Note name and price 3. Add to cart 4. Go to cart
Expected Result: Item name and price in cart match product page

Description: Checkout with special characters in name field
Steps: 1. Enter First Name: J@hn! 2. Fill other fields 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: System either accepts or shows appropriate validation error

Description: Verify tax is applied on checkout overview
Steps: 1. Add item to cart 2. Complete checkout form 3. View overview page
Expected Result: Tax amount is displayed separately from item total
